title: Grafana 12 Admin — Deprecated UI Panel Inventory
description: Tracks every UI panel type that either got REMOVED (Angular: graph, singlestat, table-old, grafana-worldmap-panel, grafana-piechart-panel pre-React) or DEPRECATED (datagrid in 12.4 → removal in 13.0). Every count here must read zero before cutover, otherwise the panel renders blank or force-migrates on load.

options.content:
### Removed & deprecated panel types (11.6.4 → 12.4.3)

| Panel type | Status | Replacement |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` (old) | 🔴 Removed (Angular) in 12.0 | `timeseries` |
| `singlestat` | 🔴 Removed (Angular) in 12.0 | `stat` |
| `table-old` | 🔴 Removed (Angular) in 12.0 | `table` (react-data-grid) |
| `grafana-worldmap-panel` | 🔴 Removed (Angular) in 12.0 | `geomap` |
| `grafana-piechart-panel` (Angular version) | 🔴 Removed in 12.0 | core `piechart` |
| `datagrid` | 🟠 Deprecated in 12.4, removed in 13.0 | `table` (react-data-grid) |

The tiles below query every dashboard via `/api/search` + inspect panel types. Any non-zero count → run `migration/20_angular_purge.py` or `migration/rewrite_datagrid_to_table.py` from the repo.

```bash
# Find every deprecated panel type on the live instance
for uid in $(gapi ${URL} /api/search?type=dash-db | jq -r '.[].uid'); do
  gapi ${URL} /api/dashboards/uid/${uid} \
    | jq -r --arg uid "$uid" '
        .dashboard.panels // []
        | .[]
        | select(.type | IN(
            "graph","singlestat","table-old",
            "grafana-worldmap-panel","grafana-piechart-panel",
            "datagrid"))
        | "\($uid)\t\(.type)\t\(.title)"'
done | tee out/audit/deprecated-panels.tsv
```

The repo's `audit/find_panel_type.py` and `audit/schema_diff.py` do the same thing and write structured JSON.

### Scan
```bash
python3 audit/find_panel_type.py --type graph --dashboards ./dashboards
python3 audit/find_panel_type.py --type singlestat --dashboards ./dashboards
python3 audit/find_panel_type.py --type table-old --dashboards ./dashboards
python3 audit/find_panel_type.py --type datagrid --dashboards ./dashboards
```

### Remediate
```bash
# Angular panels → React core
python3 migration/20_angular_purge.py

# Datagrid → Table (react-data-grid)
python3 migration/rewrite_datagrid_to_table.py \
  --panels out/audit/18-datagrid-panels.json
```

### Validate
`make validate` runs the consolidated 30-item gate; item #1, #14 and #18 all read from these audit outputs.

panels.title: Live dashboard inventory (click URL → check panel types)
